options.a: Audible signal (Morse code), 3-letter identifier for en-route NDB and 2-letter or 1-letter identifiers for locators within terminal areas.
options.b: Audible signal (Morse code), 2-letter identifier for en-route NDB and 3-letter or 2-letter identifiers for locators within terminal areas.
options.c: No audible signal, 3-letter identifier for en-route NDB and locators within terminal areas.
options.d: No audible signal, 2-letter identifier for en-route NDB and locators within terminal areas.
